_comment: Copy this to config.json in the same directory and fill in real values. config.json is gitignored so team data never leaks into the repo.

projects._comment: Each entry maps a GitHub repo (owner/name) to a Feishu group chat.

members._comment: GitHub login → Feishu identity. open_id is the ou_xxx returned by the contact API. display_name is what appears next to the @mention in the chat.
